title: HubSpot OAuth scope missing for deals
symptom: API calls to HubSpot deals endpoint return 403 or 'SCOPE_MISSING' error. Other HubSpot API calls may work fine.
applies_when: Accessing deals, pipelines, or deal-related endpoints
not_this_if: Using a HubSpot private app API key
root_cause: HubSpot OAuth apps must request specific scopes during authorization. The deals scope (crm.objects.deals.read / crm.objects.deals.write) is not included by default. If the OAuth app was authorized without deal scopes, all deal-related API calls fail with SCOPE_MISSING.
fix_steps: Check your OAuth app's required scopes in HubSpot Developer portal
Re-authorize the integration (users must re-connect to grant new scopes)
agent_instruction: Add the missing deal scopes (crm.objects.deals.read, crm.objects.deals.write) to the HubSpot OAuth app configuration, then re-authorize the integration.
safety_notes: Re-authorization requires user action — cannot be done programmatically
version_notes: Scope names changed in HubSpot API v3 — verify current scope names in docs
